content_body:
Your mountain adventure starts at North Georgia's most remarkable family attraction, Expedition: Bigfoot - where entertainment meets education. See the country's largest permanent display of genuine Bigfoot artifacts, life-sized exhibits, photos, sketches, large up-to-date sighting maps, and the World's only Bigfoot Research and Tech Vehicle on display. Enjoy The "Sasquatch Theater", browse the gift shop, or relax in our Bigfoot Reference Library. 

A 4000 sqft complex w/ genuine artifacts, life-size displays, mini research vehicle, and full-size Sasquatch, FL/GA sighting maps.
title: Expedition: Bigfoot! Museum
